---
title: "Tugas 4"
author: "Kelompok C"
date: "2026-04-03"
output: html_document
---
```{r}
#MEMBACA DATA
data <- read.csv("C:/Users/User/Downloads/hepatitis+c+virus+hcv+for+egyptian+patients/HCV-Egy-Data.csv")
head(data)
```

```{r}
#CEK TIPE DATA
str(data)
```

```{r}
#UBAH TIPE DATA 
data$Gender       <- as.factor(data$Gender)
data$Fever       <- as.factor(data$Fever)
data$'Nausea.Vomting'       <- as.factor(data$'Nausea.Vomting')
data$Headache       <- as.factor(data$Headache)
data$Diarrhea       <- as.factor(data$Diarrhea)
data$'Fatigue...generalized.bone.ache'       <- as.factor(data$'Fatigue...generalized.bone.ache')
data$Jaundice       <- as.factor(data$Jaundice)
data$'Epigastric.pain'       <- as.factor(data$'Epigastric.pain')
data$'Baseline.histological.Grading'<- as.factor(data$'Baseline.histological.Grading')
data$Baselinehistological.staging    <- factor(
  data$Baselinehistological.staging,
  levels = 1:4,
  labels = c("Stage1", "Stage2", "Stage3", "Stage4")
)
```


```{r}
#CEK MISSING VALUE
cat("Jumlah missing values:", sum(is.na(data)), "\n")
```

```{r}
#CEK PROPORSI
table(data$'Baselinehistological.staging')
prop.table(table(data$'Baselinehistological.staging'))
```

```{r}
#SELEKSI VARIABEL DENGAN KORELASI
library(corrplot)

X <- data[, sapply(data, is.numeric)]
X <- X[, !names(X) %in% "Baselinehistological.staging"]

cor_matrix <- cor(X, use = "complete.obs")

corrplot(cor_matrix, method = "color", type = "upper",
         tl.cex = 0.6, tl.col = "black",
         title  = "Matriks Korelasi Prediktor",
         mar    = c(0, 0, 2, 0))

# Pasangan dengan korelasi > 0.8
cor_data <- as.data.frame(as.table(cor_matrix))
cor_data <- subset(cor_data, abs(Freq) > 0.8 & Var1 != Var2)
print(cor_data[order(-abs(cor_data$Freq)), ])
```


```{r}
#SELEKSI VARIABEL DENGAN VIF
library(car)

#Buat data sementara dengan target numerik (VIF butuh regresi linear)
data_vif          <- data
data_vif$stag_num <- as.numeric(data_vif$Baselinehistological.staging)

#Ambil hanya prediktor numerik
nama_pred  <- names(X)   

formula_lm <- as.formula(
  paste("stag_num ~", paste(nama_pred, collapse = " + "))
)
lm_vif     <- lm(formula_lm, data = data_vif)
vif_values <- vif(lm_vif)

cat("Nilai VIF semua prediktor:\n")
print(sort(vif_values, decreasing = TRUE))

# Filter variabel dengan VIF < 10
final_vars <- names(vif_values[vif_values < 10])
cat("Variabel numerik terpilih dengan VIF < 10:\n")
print(final_vars)
```

```{r}
#SELEKSI VARIABEL DENGAN STEPWISE
library(klaR)

set.seed(123)
step_result <- stepclass(
  Baselinehistological.staging ~ ., 
  data        = data,
  method      = "lda",
  direction   = "both",
  improvement = 0.01,
  fold        = 5
)

print(step_result)
```

```{r}
#PARTITION PLOT
library(MASS)
library(klaR)
library(plyr)

# Ambil beberapa variabel numerik terpilih
numeric_subset <- final_vars[1:3]  # ambil 3 variabel numerik pertama

# Buat formula hanya dengan subset
formula_subset <- as.formula(
  paste("Baselinehistological.staging ~", paste(numeric_subset, collapse=" + "))
)

# Plot LDA & QDA
partimat(formula_subset, data = data, method = "lda")
partimat(formula_subset, data = data, method = "qda")
```

```{r}
#SPLIT DATA
library(caret)
set.seed(123)
index <- createDataPartition(data$'Baselinehistological.staging', p=.80, list=F)
train_data <- data[index, ]
test_data  <- data[-index, ]

print(paste("Jumlah data latih:", nrow(train_data)))
print(paste("Jumlah data uji  :", nrow(test_data)))
```

```{r}
#MODEL
formula <- as.formula(
  paste("Baselinehistological.staging ~", paste(final_vars, collapse = " + "))
)

lda_model <- lda(formula, data = train_data)
lda_model
```
```{r}
qda_model <- qda(formula, data = train_data)
qda_model
```

```{r}
#PREDIKSI DATA TRAIN
train.ldapred <- predict(lda_model, train_data)
head(train.ldapred$posterior)
```

```{r}
# confusion matrix LDA untuk data train
lda.cm_train <- table(train_data$Baselinehistological.staging, train.ldapred$class)
lda.cm_train
```

```{r}
# Hitung akurasi LDA
accuracy.lda <-
round((sum(diag(lda.cm_train))/sum(lda.cm_train))*100,2)
accuracy.lda
```
```{r}
#Prediksi data train
train.qdapred <- predict(qda_model, train_data)
head(train.qdapred$posterior)
```

```{r}
# confusion matrix QDA untuk data train
qda.cm_train <- table(train_data$Baselinehistological.staging,
train.qdapred$class)
qda.cm_train
```

```{r}
# Hitung akurasi QDA
accuracy.qda <-
round((sum(diag(qda.cm_train))/sum(qda.cm_train))*100,2)
accuracy.qda
```


```{r}
## Prediksi untuk data test
test.ldapred <- predict(lda_model, test_data)
head(test.ldapred$posterior)
```

```{r}
# confusion matrix LDA untuk data test
lda.cm_test <- table(test_data$Baselinehistological.staging, test.ldapred$class)
lda.cm_test
```

```{r}
# Hitung akurasi LDA
lda.accuracy_test <- round((sum(diag(lda.cm_test))/sum(lda.cm_test))*100,2)
lda.accuracy_test
```

```{r}
# confusion matrix QDA untuk data test
test.qdapred <- predict(qda_model, test_data)
qda.cm_test <- table(test_data$Baselinehistological.staging, test.qdapred$class)
qda.cm_test
```

```{r}
# Hitung akurasi QDA
qda.accuracy_test <- round((sum(diag(qda.cm_test))/sum(qda.cm_test))*100,2)
qda.accuracy_test
```

```{r}
cat("Akurasi LDA data train :", accuracy.lda, "%\n")
cat("Akurasi QDA data train :", accuracy.qda, "%\n")

cat("Akurasi LDA data test  :", lda.accuracy_test, "%\n")
cat("Akurasi QDA data test  :", qda.accuracy_test, "%\n")
```
